stories.headline: Trump says US may hit Iran’s Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’
stories.description: US president says his country may carry out more strikes on oil hub as he urges allies to help open Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
stories.description: US plane crashed in Iraq on Thursday during combat mission, killing six.

stories.headline: Republic of Congo votes in election that could extend Sassou’s 42-year rule
stories.description: Incumbent President Denis Sassou Nguesso, 82, is running for fifth term in polls boycotted by major political parties.

stories.headline: UK must build own nuclear missiles to end US reliance, says Ed Davey
stories.description: Sir Ed Davey is calling on the government to start work on a "fully independent British nuclear deterrent".

stories.headline: Vietnam holds general election, 93% candidates from ruling Communist Party
stories.description: Vietnamese elect members of parliament from a list of candidates ⁠almost exclusively fielded by the governing party.
